summary: The race-detector run found data races and a failing test assertion, causing the -race test job to fail.
root_cause: Tests failed because the race detector reported data races during test execution and at least one test assertion failed (app_test.go:1936), causing make to exit non-zero.

evidence.reason: Explicit indication that the race detector found a data race during test execution.

evidence.quote: testing.go:1712: race detected during execution of test
evidence.reason: The Go testing runtime reports that a race was detected, which causes test failure when run with -race.

evidence.quote:
app_test.go:1936:
 		Error Trace: 	/home/runner/work/argo-cd/argo-cd/cmd/argocd/commands/app_test.go:1936
 		Error:      	Not equal:
evidence.reason: Shows a concrete test assertion failure in cmd/argocd/commands/app_test.go at line 1936.
Marks the overall test run contained failures.

evidence.quote:
DONE 7346 tests, 5 skipped, 3 failures in 468.930s
make: *** [Makefile:473: test-race-local] Error 1
evidence.reason: The test make target failed (non-zero exit) after multiple test failures, confirming the job failed due to test errors.

evidence.quote:
/usr/bin/tar: Exiting with failure status due to previous errors
##[warning]Failed to restore: "/usr/bin/tar" failed with error: The process '/usr/bin/tar' failed with exit code 2
evidence.reason: Cache restore via tar failed earlier; this is visible but tests still ran — helpful to know but not the primary cause of the test failures.

suggested_fix: Reproduce the failures locally with the race detector (go test -race ./... or the specific failing package), then: (1) Inspect the race detector output / stack traces and fix identified data races by adding proper synchronization or avoiding shared mutable state in tests/code; (2) Fix the failing assertion at /home/runner/work/argo-cd/argo-cd/cmd/argocd/commands/app_test.go:1936 (update test expectation or underlying code); (3) Rerun tests with -race until no DATA RACE warnings and all assertions pass. Optionally, investigate the earlier cache restore tar errors if they recur, but they did not prevent tests from running.
